ocr_text: A LONG TIME AGO, FIGHTERS OF JIANGHU LEARNED MARTIAL ARTS IN ORDER TO PROTECT THEMSELVES FROM ENEMIES.
visual_description: A bald martial artist stands in a defensive stance on a textured background.

ocr_text: OVER TIME, MARTIAL ARTS EVOLVED FROM USING IT AS A METHOD OF SELF-DEFENSE INTO A TOOL TO KILL ENEMIES
visual_description: The same bald martial artist is shown in a dynamic fighting pose.

ocr_text: IT GREW TO BE MORE SOPHISTICATED AND COMPLEX AS THE SIMPLE FORMS BECAME A SERIES OF MOVEMENTS AND THE BREATHING TECHNIQUES REPRESENTED THE BASICS OF INTERNAL ENERGY.
visual_description: A bald martial artist sits in meditation surrounded by open books and multiple faded figures performing martial arts.

ocr_text: THE MARTIAL ARTISTS PASSED ON THEIR TEACHINGS AND HEIRLOOMS TO THE FUTURE GENERATIONS, ALLOWING MARTIAL ARTS TO CONTINUE TO EVOLVE.
visual_description: A powerful fist strikes the ground, causing a massive explosion of debris.

ocr_text: THE PEOPLE WHO HAD MASTERED MARTIAL ARTS WERE MORE POWERFUL THAN NORMAL HUMANS, AND THEY WERE SOON CALLED THE MOORIM PEOPLE (WULIN).
visual_description: A dark, textured background at the bottom of the panel.

ocr_text: FIGHTERS WHO WANTED TO BE DISCIPLES OF THE MOORIM PEOPLE GATHERED TO FORM CLANS,
visual_description: Standing atop a rocky outcrop, a long-haired figure in a flowing cloak looks out over a vast, windy landscape under a bright, hazy sky. Dry grass and leaves blow in the wind around them in a wide shot.

ocr_text: AND THOSE CLANS WERE DIVIDED INTO THE FORCES OF JUSTICE AND THE FORCES OF EVIL.
visual_description: Standing in front of their respective armies, two martial arts leaders represent opposing factions in a split-screen panel. The left side shows a white-haired man in blue robes under a blue sky, while the right side shows a dark-haired warrior in fur-trimmed armor against a fiery red backdrop.

ocr_text: AND BETWEEN THE TIGHT / BALANCE OF THOSE TWO FORCES, / THERE WAS ANOTHER GROUP THAT / PURSUED AN ENTIRELY DIFFERENT / ROUTE, SEEKING ONLY STRENGTH...
visual_description: Displaying white stylized text on a solid black background, this narrative caption panel contains no characters or setting details.

ocr_text: THE WORLD CALLED THEM THE DEMONIC CULT.
visual_description: Standing atop a grand temple staircase, a long-haired leader flanked by six guards addresses a massive crowd of followers wearing matching dark robes. The imposing, dark palace rises behind them under a reddish, smoky sky in a wide shot.

ocr_text: THE ILLEGITIMATE CHILD OF THE HIGHEST-RANKING FAMILY IN THE DEMONIC CULT WHO HAS THE RIGHT TO THE THRONE.
visual_description: Standing with his back to the viewer, a long-haired man in a yellow and black robe faces a group of bowing subordinates in dark uniforms. Medium shot, set against a hazy background of traditional temple buildings.

ocr_text: THIS IS CHEON YEO / WOON'S STORY.
visual_description: Displaying white stylized text on a solid black background, this minimalist panel serves as an introductory title card.

ocr_text: 나노마신 / 喇勞魔神
visual_description: Displaying the stylized red title logo for the webtoon "Nano Machine" against a plain white background, featuring large Korean calligraphy on top and smaller Chinese characters underneath.

ocr_text: 그림
visual_description: Displaying the Korean word '그림' in a simple black font against a plain white background, cropped closely around the text.

ocr_text: 금강불괴
visual_description: Displaying the stylized Korean text '금강불괴' in a bold, traditional-style font against a plain white background.

ocr_text: 한중월야
visual_description: Displaying black Korean characters in a traditional serif font against a plain white background, framed in a tight close-up shot.
Spanning horizontally across a plain white background, a thin grey divider line features two small circular nodes.
Stretching horizontally across a plain white background, a thin grey divider line features small circular dots near its ends.

Staring intensely with a single wide-open purple eye, a sweat-drenched character with dark hair looks forward in an extreme close-up. Strands of hair fall across their face, and sweat drips down their cheek.

ocr_text: UGH!! / 벌떡
visual_description: Sitting up abruptly in bed with a shocked, sweating expression, a young man with messy dark hair gasps awake. He wears blood-stained robes in a wooden room. Medium shot.
Curving smoothly across a plain white background, a single thick black line forms a wide arc resembling the top of a speech bubble.

ocr_text: I'M... / ALIVE? / BUT I'M SURE MY STOMACH WAS PIERCED BY THAT SWORD...?
visual_description: Sitting up in bed and staring at his hands in disbelief, a bruised, long-haired young man in tattered, blood-stained robes realizes he is alive. The medium shot shows him in a dimly lit room with wooden window frames and bookshelves in the background.
Curving smoothly across a plain white background, a single black line forms a simple arc resembling the top of a speech bubble.

ocr_text: HAPPENED...? / 스윽 / WHY IS MY WHOLE BODY SWEATING?
visual_description: Wiping sweat from his forehead, a bloodied and bruised young man with long dark hair looks down in shock inside a wooden room.

ocr_text: UGH...! / 쿨럭
visual_description: Coughing up blood while sitting up in bed, a dark-haired young man in blood-stained robes clutches his mouth in pain. High-angle shot of the character on a traditional floor mat with dramatic speed lines.
Displaying the sharp, spiky top border of a speech bubble or action caption box against a plain white background.

ocr_text: HUH? / WHAT'S THIS? / 끈저억 / WHAT ARE
visual_description: Reaching out with a soot-stained hand, a character touches a sticky black substance clinging to the hair of a dark-haired person. Close-up shot showing the viscous black thread stretching between the fingers and hair against a plain background.

ocr_text: SPOTS?
visual_description: Displaying a close-up of a speech bubble containing the word 'SPOTS?' in black comic-style text against a white background.

ocr_text: IT SMELLS AWFUL... / 축 / MY WHOLE BODY IS STICKY... / I feel like throwing up / 축 / ARE YOU AWAKE,
visual_description: Pulling open his dirty robe, a long-haired man grimaces at the black, sticky residue covering his chest and hands in a medium close-up shot.
Floating against a white background, a blank rectangular speech bubble features jagged, lightning-like tails on its bottom left and right corners.
Curving smoothly across a plain white background, a single black line forms a simple arc.

ocr_text: WHAT? / ARE YOU AWAKE,
visual_description: Looking sideways in utter shock with wide eyes and a sweating face, a disheveled young man with long, messy purple hair reacts to an off-screen voice. Medium close-up shot.
Floating against a plain white background, a blank, rectangular speech bubble with jagged, lightning-like tails on both bottom corners is shown in a close-up shot.
Displaying the upper border of a jagged, empty speech bubble against a plain white background.

ocr_text: WHO... WHO ARE YOU?!
visual_description: Recoiling in terror, a disheveled, blood-stained man with long dark hair stares wide-eyed at a figure rising under a blue blanket. Set in a traditional wooden room with bookshelves, shown in a medium shot.

ocr_text: THERE ISN'T ANYONE AROUND... WHAT IS THIS... / 두리번 / 두리번 / PLEASE CALM
visual_description: Looking around frantically with wide, sweating eyes, a dark-haired man searches his surroundings in an extreme close-up shot. Korean sound effects for looking around flank his face.

ocr_text: TELEPATHY...? / NO, NOT THAT...
visual_description: Floating against a plain white background, a spiky, black-bordered oval speech bubble displays inner thoughts.

ocr_text: I'VE HEARD IT ONCE BEFORE BUT THIS IS DIF-FERENT...
visual_description: Floating on a plain white background, a spiky oval thought bubble contains black text expressing realization or shock.

ocr_text: THIS SOUNDS LIKE IT'S COMING DIRECTLY FROM MY HEAD... / ......
visual_description: Looking sideways with a tense, sweating expression, a long-haired man with dark purple hair reacts to a voice in his head. Close-up profile shot against a plain dark background.
Curving downwards against a plain white background, a single thick black line forms a smooth arc resembling the bottom edge of a speech bubble.

ocr_text: ...NO WAY, COULD IT BE COMING FROM MY HEAD? / YOU ARE RIGHT, MASTER. / HUH...!
visual_description: Standing in a tense, defensive stance with wide, shocked eyes, a young man with messy dark hair and a blood-stained white martial arts uniform reacts to a voice inside a wooden room with a bookshelf in the background. Medium shot.
Curving sharply along the bottom edge, a spiky black-outlined speech bubble is shown in a close-up shot against a plain white background.

ocr_text: ONCE AGAIN, WHO ARE YOU?! / I CONNECT AND SERVE AS A CORE TO SUPPORT MASTER'S BRAIN. / I AM [SKY CORPORATION'S 7TH
visual_description: Standing with fists clenched and shouting in anger, a bruised, long-haired man in a tattered light-colored robe stands inside a traditional room with paper-screen windows. Medium-full shot with dynamic speed lines.
Framing a blank white space, the sharp black outline of a spiky action speech bubble curves upward into three distinct peaks against a white background.

ocr_text: WHAT? WHAT ARE YOU TALKING ABOUT? / WHO ARE YOU AND WHY ARE YOU DOING THIS TO ME?!
visual_description: Screaming in anguish and confusion with eyes tightly shut, a bruised, dark-haired man with sweat dripping down his face yells with his mouth wide open. Close-up shot against a simple background with light particles.
Cropping closely on the bottom jagged border of an empty, spiky white speech bubble against a white background.
Displaying the upper portion of an empty, jagged-edged speech bubble with sharp, lightning-like corners against a plain white background.

ocr_text: GENERATION NANO MACHINE. / NANO... / EVIL GOD...? / THAT'S CORRECT. A NANO MACHINE. / TN: HE MISHEARD IT AS MUHCHINE WHICH MEANS EVIL GOD
visual_description: Standing with his back turned to the viewer, a dark-haired man in a torn, blood-stained white robe looks out of a window. Medium shot of the character inside a traditional wooden room.
Framing an empty, wide speech bubble with jagged tails pointing downwards, set against a plain white background.

ocr_text: IS IT TALKING ABOUT THE EVIL GOD... / THE ONE THAT THE DEMONIC CULT WORSHIPS...?!
visual_description: Staring wide-eyed in sheer shock and realization, a dark-haired character sweats nervously. This extreme close-up focuses on their panicked eyes against a background of horizontal motion lines, framed by two spiky-bordered inner monologue bubbles.
